mapper.select: SELECT id, customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", channel, template_id as "templateId", subject, body, recipient_address as "recipientAddress", sent_at as "sentAt", delivered_at as "deliveredAt", failure_reason as "failureReason", retry_count as "retryCount", state_id as "stateId" FROM hm_query.notification_flat WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", channel, template_id as "templateId", subject, failure_reason as "failureReason", retry_count as "retryCount", state_id as "stateId" FROM hm_query.notification_flat WHERE state_id IN ('FAILED', 'BOUNCED') AND customer_id = #{customerId} AND channel = #{channel} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT id, customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", channel, template_id as "templateId", subject, sent_at as "sentAt", delivered_at as "deliveredAt", retry_count as "retryCount", state_id as "stateId" FROM hm_query.notification_flat WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT id, customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", channel, template_id as "templateId", subject, sent_at as "sentAt", retry_count as "retryCount", state_id as "stateId" FROM hm_query.notification_flat WHERE channel = #{channel} AND state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT id, customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", channel, template_id as "templateId", subject, sent_at as "sentAt", retry_count as "retryCount", state_id as "stateId" FROM hm_query.notification_flat WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
